news.t: Duff & Phelps Investment Management Introduces Actively Managed Clean Energy ETF

holdings.infoBox: VCLN is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 9.04%, First Solar at 8.38%, Nextpower at 7.05%, China Yangtze Power at 5.36%, and Enphase Energy at 4.74%.

overview.description: The Virtus Duff & Phelps Clean Energy ETF (VCLN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in clean energy companies from around the world. VCLN was launched on Aug 3, 2021 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.

data.title: Duff & Phelps Investment Management Introduces Actively Managed Clean Energy ETF
data.text: HARTFORD, Conn., Aug. 4, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- Duff & Phelps Investment Management Co. and Virtus ETF Solutions , both affiliates of Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRTS), today announced the...
